iteration_1.notes: Baseline (unmodified skill). power-flow lost 15pts on angles-reasonable: model used MW directly with per-unit reactances, producing angles ~6-11 rad instead of <1.0. economic-dispatch within-limits always scores 0 due to test pattern bug (regex 'within limits' doesn't match test name 'all generators within min/max limits').

iteration_2.notes: Added per-unit conversion guidance (divide MW by base_MVA=100). power-flow fixed to 100. economic-dispatch unchanged (capped at 80 by test bug).

iteration_3.notes: Added instruction to verify dispatch.json with read tool and write directly if missing. No improvement possible on economic-dispatch.

max_achievable_scores.note: economic-dispatch within-limits criterion (20% weight) always scores 0 for ALL models due to test pattern bug: regex 'within limits' cannot match test name 'all generators within min/max limits'

changes_made: Added CRITICAL per-unit conversion section: divide MW by base_MVA (100) before solving B*theta=P, multiply flows back by base_MVA
Added complete runnable Python3 scripts for both tasks
Added instruction to verify output files exist after exec
Added validation checklists for both tasks
